# `st` CLI reference

Extracted from CLAUDE.md as part of I-734; the command-reference section
below is regenerated by `cd as && make docs` (I-738). The source of
truth is the cobra command tree in `as/cmd/as/app.go` — never hand-edit
the command sections.

All tasks, issues, and ideas are tracked in `theraprac-workspace/agent-state/` via the `st` CLI (available as `st` on PATH). Always use `st` — never `bin/st` or `./bin/st`. Never use `gh issue create`, GitHub Issues, or direct file edits for tracking work.

## Workspace clone layout (I-418)

One canonical workspace clone at `theraprac-agents/theraprac-workspace`. Each agent's `theraprac-agent-<x>/theraprac-workspace` is a **symlink** to it — do not replace the symlink with a real clone. All agent-state writes serialize through the canonical `.git`, eliminating push/rebase contention between agents. Per-agent identity is derived from the parent dir name (`theraprac-agent-<x>`); `.as/local-agent.yaml` is gitignored to prevent it from clobbering identity across agents.

## Fresh-machine bootstrap: install the `st` dispatcher (I-419)

`st` on PATH is a small dispatcher at `~/bin/st` that selects the right per-agent binary at call time (and pins `ST_ROOT` to the caller's agent workspace so identity resolves correctly when running outside the workspace dir). The dispatcher ships from the `as` repo (cloned per-agent at `theraprac-agent-<x>/as`):

```bash
# from any agent's as clone, e.g. theraprac-agent-b/as
make install-wrapper                          # default ~/bin/st
make install-wrapper WRAPPER_PATH=/usr/local/bin/st   # alternate target

# or directly without make:
bash scripts/install-dispatcher.sh
WRAPPER_PATH=/usr/local/bin/st bash scripts/install-dispatcher.sh
```

The installer is idempotent — re-run after pulling new dispatcher logic (e.g. new env-var exports, new resolution rules). Each agent runs `make install` from its own clone to keep `<agent>/as/bin/st` up to date; the dispatcher routes per-agent automatically.

## Regenerating this file

The command reference below is generated by walking the live cobra tree
in `as/cmd/as/app.go`. To regenerate after adding/renaming a command:

```bash
cd as && make docs
```

The Makefile writes to `$ST_WORKSPACE_ROOT/docs/st-cli-reference.md`
(default: `../theraprac-workspace/docs/st-cli-reference.md`). Commit
the regenerated file from the workspace clone; the source change lives
in the `as` PR, the doc refresh lives in the workspace PR.
